title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.330 - Exceptions to section 511.320
text:
511.330.  Exceptions to section 511.320. — Nothing contained in section 511.320 shall be so construed as to require a party to record a judgment or decree when a conveyance has been executed in pursuance thereof, and acknowledged or proved and deposited for record in the proper office within the time therein limited.
(RSMo 1939 § 1299) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1135; 1919 § 1586; 1909 § 2155
